chapter_title.en: The Merits of the Ziyārah of Fāťimah (s.a.), the Daughter of Mūsā ibn Ja’far (a.s.), in Qum

text: 2 حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي وَ أَخِي وَ الْجَمَاعَةُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ إِدْرِيسَ وَ غَيْرِهِ عَنِ الْعَمْرَكِيِّ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الْبُوفَكِيِّ عَمَّنْ ذَكَرَهُ عَنِ ابْنِ الرِّضَا (ع) قَالَ مَنْ زَارَ قَبْرَ عَمَّتِي بِقُمَّ فَلَهُ الْجَنَّةُ

en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani: 2. My father, my brother, and the group narrated to me from Aḥmad ibn Idrīs, and from others, from ‘Amraki ibn ‘Ali Al-Būfaki, from someone whose name he mentioned, who said: The son of Riďā (Imam Jawād (a.s.)) said: Those who go to the Ziyārah of my aunt in Qum will be rewarded with Paradise.
